allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, npx 2>$null | Select-Object Name, Source; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node" })

PowerShell($env:Path -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node|npm" }; ls "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
